message_text: Senior DevOps Engineer at BookNook $150,000 - 180,000 / year US Core competencies: Google Cloud, AWS, Python, Java, JavaScript, Node.js, Heroku About the project: As a Senior DevOps Engineer at BookNook, you will immediately play an integral role in building out, scaling, and optimizing our cloud-based learning platform. You will be the first DevOps engineer joining our fast-growing technology organization. Youll have the opportunity to shape the future direction of our services, building a department responsible for delivering outstanding user experiences and learning tools. As a Senior DevOps Engineer, you will play a key role in driving an engineering infrastructure and culture that emphasizes operational excellence and sustainable practices that can weather immense growth. [APPLY](

Senior Java Software Engineer at LIVEBUY $53,250 - 72,600 / year Germany Technology stack: AWS, Elasticsearch, REST, RabbitMQ, Redis, sql, Spring About the project: We are currently expanding our core cross-functional team and you will be an important member of it. You will be working closely with our highly experienced CTO, product manager, UX/UI designer and front end developers. Your main objective will be to ensure smooth sailing for our highly dynamic applications by expanding the capacity and stability of our backend. Thousands of people simultaneously joining and interacting with our live streams should sound like music to your ears, rather than a nightmare. [APPLY](

Senior Product Designer at Inyova AG $133,900 - 164,800 / year Switzerland Core competencies: Figma, Sketch, UX, UI About the project: As Senior Product Designer joining the Inyova Design team, you will focus on delivering the best possible experience for our impact investors. You will work in the newly created Product Discovery squad (CPO, Marketing specialist, engineer) to uncover hidden customer needs and turn those into valuable products. [APPLY](

Project Manager at BayCare $81,000 - 100,000 / year US Core competencies: Project Management About the project: BayCare is currently in search of our newest Team Member who is passionate about providing outstanding customer service to our community. We are looking for an individual seeking a career opportunity with one of the largest employers within the Tampa Bay area. Our team members focus on tomorrow by achieving personal and professional success today. The IS Project Manager is responsible for organizing projects by developing comprehensive project plans to include design, build, testing, training, change management, communication and activation plans. [APPLY](

Junior Software Developer at CGI Group, Inc. $1,500 - 3,000 / month US Technology stack: sql, .NET About the project: Do you have a proven interest in information technology and a passion for learning? Are you a go-to problem solver that is motivated to make a difference by tackling sophisticated technical challenges leading to the creation and design of cutting-edge solutions for our clients? If so, joining CGI as a Software Developer could be the ideal opportunity for you. [APPLY](

DevOps Engineer (Codefi) at ConsenSys $1,500 - 2,500 / month US Core competencies: AWS, Azure, GitHub, Gitlab CI, Kubernetes, Circle CI, Jenkins, Prometheus About the project: As a DevOps Engineer within ConsenSys Codefi you will be joining a world reference technical team with State of the Art expertise in developing & delivering advanced decentralized applications (apps) and supporting development and production infrastructure. Your job will be to deliver, upgrade and maintain infrastructure with high cybersecurity standards (ISO/SOC2). You will be involved and drive in our code deployment (CI / CD) and setting-up, configuring and running development/test and staging/production infrastructure across multiple products and critical applications and multiple cloud providers (AWS, Azure). With the objective to drive towards standard infrastructure tooling and configuration across our group. [APPLY](

Digital Product Analyst at British Airways $5,000 - 10,000 / month UK Core competencies: Adobe Target, Product Development, Problem-solving, Balance customer needs About the project: This is a key time to be joining British Airways as we Build a Better BA. We take huge pride in our past but were looking to the future as an airline that loves embracing the best of modern Britain. Our countrys creativity, diversity, style, wit and warmth are the same special qualities that make us who we are. If youre made of the same qualities as us, you could soon be part of the next chapter of our story. Together as one team, were connecting Britain with the world and the world to Britain like no one else. [APPLY](

Middle DevOPS at Morningstar Technologies $4,500 - 6,000 / month UAE Remote Core competencies: AWS, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, Docker Swarm, Docker About the project: The international company Morningstar Technlogies is looking for a Middle DevOPS to join the core team implementing various startup projects (mainly fintech and martech). We build startups from scratch based on concepts that we develop internally. Our portfolio includes a crypto-to-fiat service, a crypto exchange and other projects. [APPLY](

Data Scientist at Rio Tinto $5,000 - 10,000 / month Australia Core competencies: sql, Pandas, Numpy, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Keras About the project: We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our Exploration Data Science Team to develop insights on where in the world we should explore and help us discover better deposits faster. Working as part of a global team in Rio Tinto Exploration (RTX), you will enable data integration, remove silos, connect workflows and conduct general data wrangling of complex datasets. This is a great opportunity for a data scientist to work at the forefront of technology in a diverse and rapidly evolving field. We have a rich and rapidly growing repository of data to help map, prioritize and test the best minerals targets around the globe - from surface geochemistry, airborne geophysics, satellite remote sensing and drillhole spectral scanning data, to social and environmental data. This role is key to the future of our business. [APPLY](

Project Manager at BITHGROUP Technologies $5,000 - 10,000 / month US Core competencies: Cost Management, Documentation Development, Process Management, Project Control, Project Management, Project Planning, Risk Management About the project: BITHGROUP Technologies provided implementation services, technical expertise and project management support on one of our organization's largest and most strategic projects. Dr. Wallace and his staff consistently held professionalism, teamwork and customer service in the highest regard. [APPLY](

Frontend Engineer at CipherTrace $103,000 - 130,000 / year US Remote Technology stack: JavaScript, Angular About the project: - Build the next generation cryptocurrency tools, law enforcement tools, and DeFi platforms. - Build middleware services to interface the UI to the Back End infrastructure. - Write Angular.js to display Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies cross-platform. - Debug and perform quality testing on the Blockchain cryptocurrency data user interface. - Design reactive API software for real-time cryptocurrency displays. - Write software in JavaScript to allow users to interactively investigate wallets and addresses of multiple cryptocurrencies. - Co-design software APIs with back-end developers to access cryptocurrency feeds. - Develop middleware modules to visualize cryptocurrency transactions. [APPLY](

Junior Data Scientist at Liberty Mutual Insurance $99,000 - 115,000 / year US Remote Core competencies: django, flask, PyTorch About the project: The Advanced Analytics and Modeling department within Global Retail Markets U.S. Insights & Solutions is actively searching for a highly motivated data scientist to join our team and contribute to our growing portfolio of models. Our team has boundless opportunities to help Liberty Mutual by building models that help improve customer service. Some examples of activities that the models aid include: chat bots, customer routing, and save tactics. In this role, you will work closely with more senior data scientists on the team, while also partnering with data engineers, model deployment engineers, stakeholders, and others to bring value-add models to market. [APPLY](

iOS Developer at Vestiaire Collective $5,000 - 10,000 / month Germany Technology stack: Swift, Objective-C About the project: Our Traffic Collective's goal is to allow customers to visit our cool app and website again and again. Their scopes include everything from the onboarding of new users to CRM, push-notifications and other communications for our 23M users. As an iOS Developer youll ensure technical expertise on our mobile platform. Youll closely work with our Mobile Experts, Team Leaders, QA and have a deep work connection with the Product Design Team. By joining our Engineering team, you will be working with talented individuals grouped in small independent agile teams (squads) that each have strong ownership over their domain. Our iOS stack includes Swift, MVVM, no storyboard (snapkit), Quick & Nimble for unit tests and Fastlane/Bitrise. We are consistently working on improving our stack to provide the best possible developer experience. Some of our ongoing projects include experimentation with SwiftUI in production, moving towards feature modularization and pushing towards the latest stable from Apples stack. [APPLY](

Product manager at G-Core Labs $48,000 - 76,000 (year) Luxembourg Remote Core competencies: Agile, B2B, Backlogs Prioritization, Customer Development, Kanban, Market research, Prioritization, Product strategy About the project: Joining us as a Product Manager (Security) you will be the owner of an actively growing product group, which includes the protection of websites, applications, as well as server infrastructure. You will need to draw a product development roadmap, monitor its implementation, together with the product team. The main task of this role is to ensure the profitable growth of the product, which implies responsibility for product, financial and operational indicators, as well as for strategic goals focused on development and growth. The product manager will have to actively interact with all departments: marketing, development, project managers, operating teams, technical support, sales managers, third-party vendors, as well as with the technical product manager. [APPLY](

Full Stack Engineer at Candide Ltd JavaScript $60,000 - 96,000 (year) UK The Role: You will be initially joining our team to provide a series of mobile apps to our clients before merging with our South African branch to revamp the ecommerce engine driving our clients growth. The work will be incredibly varied and you will be expected to work on all aspects of our technology stack from databases, deployments, services, third-party integrations and ultimately to our customer-facing front-ends. Helping Candide to deliver these projects will mean you will have the option to travel and work on-site with our clients to see how well your systems stand-up to real-world stresses. [Learn More...](

Test Engineer at Trupanion Automation $54,000 - 66,000 (year) UK Trupanion is a leading provider of medical insurance for cats and dogs in North America. Our mission is to help the pets we all love receive the veterinary care they need. The UK is Trupanion's technology and innovation centre of excellence. We create solutions to ensure our members, their pets, and their vets experience unparalleled customer service. We offer a collaborative, informal, and pet-friendly environment where everyone is encouraged to be the very best version of themselves. [Learn More...](

Senior iOS Developer at Vestiaire Collective Swift + Objective-C $5,000 - 10,000 Portugal As an iOS Developer you'll ensure technical expertise on our mobile platform. You'll closely work with our Mobile Experts, Team Leaders, QA and have a deep work connection with the Product Design Team. By joining our Engineering team, you will be working with talented individuals grouped in small independent agile teams (squads) that each have strong ownership over their domain. Our iOS stack includes Swift, MVVM, no storyboard (snapkit), Quick & Nimble for unit tests and Fastlane/Bitrise. We are consistently working on improving our stack to provide the best possible developer experience. Some of our ongoing projects include experimentation with SwiftUI in production, moving towards feature modularization and pushing towards the latest stable from Apple's stack. [Learn More...](

Backend Developer at Corti Python + Golang + Java + C# + C/C++ 5 000 - 10 000$ Denmark You'll be joining Corti's Backend Developer team, there you'll be Corti's integral to build, maintaining, and improving Cortis internal and external facing tools and applications, write APIs, and ensure Corti a frontier position in backend development.

Senior Backend Engineer at Cosigned Golang 10 000 - 15 000$ Canada What youll do Lead backend development as a core member of the founding team Work with high profile artists and creators from the music and film industries Bring crypto mainstream by building a Web3 product that will impact millions of everyday people.

US Call Center Recruitment (for Filipino Applicants) Job Requirements: Excellent English communication skills Neutral accent (no obvious regional accent) Base Salary: $1,200 + $300 full attendance bonus Commission Structure: 3% / 7% (calculated after deducting 30% channel fees) Commission Example: Deposit: $10,000 Performance: $10,000 0.7 = $7,000 3% Commission: $7,000 0.03 = $210 7% Commission: $7,000 0.07 = $490 Regarding "Base Salary": If the monthly commission is less than $1,200, the salary will be adjusted to $1,200. URGENT WARNING TO JOB SEEKERS IN UAE BEWARE OF SCAM JOB OFFICES! Job scams are increasing across the UAE, especially targeting freshers and jobseekers desperate for opportunities. Many scammers use fake job offers, unregistered consultancies, and misleading office addresses to collect money for interviews, training, or visa processing. If you receive a job call from any of the below locations, be extremely cautious. These addresses have been repeatedly reported by jobseekers as suspicious or scam-related. Suspicious/Scam-Prone OFFICE ADDRESSES Sharjah (14 locations) Avoid if mentioned in a job call or email: 101-B, 1st Floor, Sharjah Tower, Near Al Jubail Bus Station Abu Shagara, Opp. Safeer Market, Gazebo Restaurant, Office No. 14 Office #1, 1st Floor, Yellow Building Before Al Jubail Bus Station MUKHAWI Building, Office 205, Al Qasmiyah Khalifa Building, Office 105, Al Istaqlal Street, Abu Shagara Jumbo Sonic Bus Stand, Abu Shagara 266, Trimmers Salon Building, Office 14 Office 204, 2nd Floor, Al Faisal 1 Building, Al Nud, Al Qasmiyah Muhammad Al-Mulla Tower, 11th Floor, Office 1104, Al Nahda Opp. Immigration Office, Falafil Al Rabiah Cafeteria, 2nd Floor, Office 205 Al Zahra St, Damas Building G2000, Office 348 Dubai Islamic Bank Building, Block C, 3rd Floor, Office 301 King Faisal St, Opp. Prime Medical Centre, Office 14 Burj 2000G Building, Entrance #6, Office 348, Al Rolla Scam-Prone OFFICE ADDRESSES Dubai (10+ locations) Dusseldorf Business Point, Room 106, Al Barsha Road, Near MOE Abu Saif Business Center, Al Qiyadah Metro Exit 2, Office 117 R.K.M Building, Mezzanine Floor, Office M05, Behind Al Qiyada Metro Real Estate Center, Jumeirah 1, Office 305 Sultan Khalifa Building, Office M03, Near NMC Hospital, Abu Hail Exit 3 Zakher Business Center, Office M-6, Near Abu Hail Center, Deira Khalid Al Attar Building, Burjuman Metro Exit 1, Office 103 Bushaqer Building, GGICO Metro Exit 2, Office 203 Al Mostafawi Business Center, Sharaf DG Exit 1, Office 303 City Bay Business Building, Abu Hail Metro Exit 2, Office 418 Al Wahda Building, Gateway Office, 4th Floor, Office 01 ALSO REPORTED: L Mulla Tower, 6th Floor 609, Near Night to Night Market / Ansar Mall R.K.M Building, Office M05, Mezzanine Floor, Al Qiyada Metro Exit 2 How to Protect Yourself: Never pay for interviews, registrations, or training. Check the company website and trade license. Verify the company on Google Maps + LinkedIn. Avoid offices calling from WhatsApp only. Trust your instinctsif it sounds too good to be true, it is. Let's Protect Each Other If you know more scam addresses, please comment and help other jobseekers stay safe. Attention Professionals in the UAE! Heres an important update for those applying for UAE labour visas, especially under senior or managerial positions (Manager, Director, Supervisor, etc.) It has become mandatory to have a Recognition or Equivalency Number to process your UAE labour contract. Without it, your visa application may face delays or even rejection. What You Need to Know If your degree was earned outside the UAE, you must complete the attestation and recognition process before applying for your labour contract. Step-by-Step Process 1 University Attestation Verify your degree with your university. 2 Higher Education Commission (HEC) Get attestation from your countrys higher education authority. 3 Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MOFA) Have it stamped by MOFA in your home country. 4 UAE Embassy (in your home country) Get attestation from the UAE Embassy. 5 MOFA in the United Arab Emirates Complete final attestation once you arrive. 6 Apply for Recognition of University Certificates Issued Outside the UAE Through the UAE Ministry of Education (formerly Ministry of Higher Education and Scientific Research). About the Recognition Report This is an official document confirming your qualification meets UAE academic and professional standards. Its now a key requirement for employment, particularly for managerial positions Purpose of Recognition Employment and labour contract processing Visa and residency requirements Higher education admission Compliance with UAE government standards Pro Tip Start your attestation and recognition process early! Timelines vary by university and country, but this step is now essential for securing employment in the UAE . Lets spread awareness Many professionals are still unaware of this new requirement. Share this to help others stay informed and prepared!
